task: Add a feature flag 'rollout_v2' to the user service and verify the tests still pass.
successCriteria: src/users/flags.ts exports the flag, the canonical feature registry in src/features/registry.ts wires it, and `npm test` exits 0.

artifacts.description: What the worker changed, as JSON: files touched and a one-line summary per file.

steps.instruction: Add a boolean feature flag called 'rollout_v2' to src/users/flags.ts (default false). Wire it into the canonical feature registry in src/features/registry.ts. Update src/users/service.ts to read the flag and branch on it for the new rollout path. Record what you changed in implementation-notes as { files: [{ path, change }] }.

steps.summary: Feature flag shipped and tests are green.
Feature flag implementation failed or tests did not pass.
